addPeople.modalDescription: Find and follow your favorite artists!
addPeople.adultModalDescription: Find and follow your favorite adult stars!
addPeople.noInactiveDesc: Everyone we found is already followed, or you haven't scanned and organized any new movies or TV shows yet. Try organizing some files to discover new cast and crew!
addPeople.adultNoInactiveDesc: Everyone we found is already followed, or you haven't scanned and organized any new adult titles yet. Try organizing some files to discover new stars!
addPeople.noSearchResultsDesc: We couldn't find anyone locally with that name. Let's try searching again!
addPeople.noFilterResultsDesc: Try clearing or changing your filters to see more suggestions.
addPeople.adultNoSearchResultsDesc: We couldn't find any adult stars locally with that name. Let's try another name!
addPeople.adultNoFilterResultsDesc: Try clearing or relaxing the local star filters to see more suggestions.
addPeople.adultTmdbSearchPlaceholder: Search for adult stars, performers, or creators...
addPeople.searchEmptyDesc: Look up actors, directors, or writers on TMDb and follow them.
addPeople.searchNoResultsDesc: We couldn't find anyone matching that name in the online database. Let's try another spelling!
addPeople.adultSearchEmptyDesc: Find adult stars and creators on the remote database and follow them.
addPeople.adultSearchNoResultsDesc: No adult stars on the remote database matched this search. Let's try another name!

movies.title: No Movies Found
movies.description: Your movie library is empty. Let's run a scan or organize some media to fill it up!

collections.title: No Collections Found
collections.description: No custom collections here yet. You can group your movies and TV shows into collections to keep things organized!

tv.title: No TV Shows Found
tv.description: Your TV show library is empty. Let's scan and match some shows in the organizer!

people.title: No Artists Found
people.description: No directors, actors, or writers followed yet. Try scanning your files to find the cast and crew details!

adult.title: No Adult Content Found
adult.description: Your adult media library is empty. Let's make sure your files are correctly matched and organized in the organizer!

adult_tv.title: No Adult TV Shows Found
adult_tv.description: Your adult TV shows library is empty. Let's get them matched and organized!

scenes.title: No Scenes Found
scenes.description: Your scenes library is empty. Let's scan and match some adult content in the organizer!

adult_scenes.title: No Scenes Found
adult_scenes.description: Your scenes library is empty. Let's scan and match some adult content in the organizer!

videos.title: No Videos Found
videos.description: Your videos library is empty. Scan and organize your home videos in the organizer to see them here!

adult_videos.title: No Videos Found
adult_videos.description: Your videos library is empty. Scan and organize your adult home videos in the organizer to see them here!

adultPeople.title: No Stars Found
adultPeople.description: No stars or creators from adult media followed yet. Go follow some stars!

adultCollections.title: No Adult Collections Found
adultCollections.description: Your adult collections library is empty. Group your adult media into collections to keep them organized!

adultTags.title: No Adult Tags Created
adultTags.description: No custom tags yet. You can add tags on any adult media details page to easily group them!

tags.title: No Tags Created
tags.description: No custom tags yet. You can add tags on any media details page to easily group them!

search.title: No matching {tab} found
search.description: Let's try a different search term or check the spelling.

filter.title: Nothing fits these filters
filter.description: Try clearing or relaxing a few filters to bring {tab} back into view.

tags.emptyFocusTitle: This tag is ready to use.
tags.emptyFocusDescription: Add this tag to movies, shows, artists, or stars and they will show up here!
tags.modalDescription: Create a new custom tag for organizing your media.
tags.editModalDescription: Rename the tag or adjust its color.
tags.deleteModalDescription: Remove this tag from every tagged item.
tags.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" and remove it from all tagged items?
tags.errorExists: A tag with this name already exists

details.cachingFilmography: Downloading and caching {{name}}'s complete filmography from {{source}}... This only happens once to make browsing instant!
details.emptyCredits: No credits found for this source.
details.emptyCredits_tv: No TV shows found on TMDb.
details.lowResolutionWarning: Heads up! This scene's image resolution is a bit low ({{width}}x{{height}}). We recommend at least 1280 width for the best look.
details.primarySourceSetFailed: Oops! We couldn't set the primary source. Let's try again!
details.unlinkSourceFailed: Oops! We couldn't unlink this source right now.
details.noRatingsAvailable: No ratings yet. Be the first to add one!
details.allKeywordsTagged: All keywords already exist as tags.
details.noTechnicalInfo: No technical details available for this file.
details.noExternalLinks: No external links found for this item.
details.noBackdropsAvailable: We couldn't find any good backdrop choices for this title.
details.backdropUpdateFailed: Oops! We couldn't update the backdrop.
details.backdropFilterRunning: Looking for background choices ({{checked}}/{{total}})... Feel free to keep browsing!
details.backdropFilterFinishing: Wrapping up backdrop checks... Feel free to keep browsing!
details.imageUpdated: All set! The image was updated successfully.
details.imageUpdateFailed: Oops! We couldn't update the image.
details.imageUploaded: All set! Your image was uploaded and updated.
details.imageUploadFailed: Oops! We couldn't upload the image.
details.deletePerformerWarning: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this star? You'll lose any custom bio, ratings, and attributes you've set for them. If you want to keep this data, you can just unfollow them from their profile page instead.
details.primarySourceSet: All set! The primary source for details has been updated.
details.noPeaks: No finishes recorded yet. Tap the button below to add one!

performerEdit.failedToLoadPerformer: Oops! We couldn't load the adult star's details.
performerEdit.linkedProfilesSubtitle: Link profiles from online databases to automatically import their details.
performerEdit.dataMixerGridSubtitle: Pick which website we should get each detail from (like their birthday or height).
performerEdit.manualOverridesSubtitle: Write your own details for this star. Anything you write here will be used instead of the online databases.
performerEdit.noResultsMatch: We couldn't find anyone matching that query. Let's try another name!
performerEdit.typeANameHint: Type a name above and hit search to find details for this star online!

validation.height: Height has to be between 50 and 300 cm
validation.weight: Weight has to be between 30 and 300 kg
validation.cupSize: We need a valid cup size here (1-3 letters, like B or DD)
validation.bandSize: Band size has to be between 10 and 100
validation.waist: Waist has to be between 10 and 100
validation.hip: Hip has to be between 10 and 100
validation.correctErrors: Please fix the errors above before saving!
validation.underage: Star must be at least 18 years and 2 weeks old

mixer.routing_update_failed: Oops! We couldn't update the metadata routing.

linking.link_source_failed: Oops! We couldn't link this source.
linking.performer_deleted: All done! The adult star has been removed from the database.
linking.delete_performer_failed: Oops! We couldn't delete the star.

custom.values_saved: All set! Custom values saved successfully.
custom.save_values_failed: Oops! We couldn't save your custom values.
custom.fetch_healthyceleb_success: Awesome! Successfully fetched stats from HealthyCeleb.
custom.fetch_healthyceleb_failed: Oops! We couldn't fetch stats from HealthyCeleb.
custom.import_healthyceleb_desc: This will fetch stats like height, weight, cup size, measurements, and eye/hair color, then populate the fields below. You can review them before saving.
